# Note Names to Frequencies

## Lesson Goal

Translate musician note names into frequencies.

## What to Notice

The notebook connects music vocabulary to signal vocabulary.

## Work With the Notebook

- [Open the notebook source](https://github.com/buildLittleWorlds/marimo-audio-self-tutorial/blob/main/notebooks/04_note_names/notebook.py)
- [Run the browser notebook](https://buildlittleworlds.github.io/marimo-audio-self-tutorial/notebooks/04_note_names/)

Run locally:

```bash
uv run marimo edit notebooks/04_note_names/notebook.py
```

## Feedback Lens

Look for clear explanation of semitone spacing and why A4 is used as an anchor.

## Instructor Notes

Use this lesson as a small checkpoint. Before asking students to add features,
ask them to name the input, the transformation, the output, and the current
limitation. That habit will matter more in later transcription notebooks than
any one line of code.
